hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(crypto\.ts|use-vault\.ts)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Zero-knowledge encryption file. Requires explicit user approval and security-auditor review. See CLAUDE.md escalation rules.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'packages/frontend'; then cd /Users/sohaibfaroukh/Work/personal/derma-consent && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
